hero_061: Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Consort Yu Woodland Ranger General Information Lane: Farm Lane Role: Marksman Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 1013 Wins : 1235 Loses (45.06%) Light as the breeze... swift as an arrow. Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Blessing of the Dryads 2.2 Skill 1: Oak Bolt 2.3 Skill 2: Protecting Winds 2.4 Skill 3: Vaulting Shot 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] A girl at one with the forces of nature, innocent and beautiful. Every arrow from her bow radiates the blessings of the forest. Acting upon her master's orders, she embarked on a journey to explore the world around her, and in the process, fell in love with the heroic Xiang Yu. However, she was warned by her senior, Liang, that the person she had fallen in love with was the dark master from the prophecies. Brokenhearted and resigned to her fate, Consort Yu's arrow had already tragically pierced her lover's heart when the illusion of the being disguised as Liang wore off. How will this fateful love tragedy end, and what should the despairing Consort Yu do? Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Blessing of the Dryads [ edit ] Blessing of the Dryads Passive Skill Ability Type Continuous Fire Slow Basic Attacks have a chance to shoot two bolts in a row and inflict slow . Skill 1: Oak Bolt [ edit ] Oak Bolt Skill 1 Damage Physical Charges up and shoots a bolt in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in its path. The higher her Attack Speed, the shorter the charge time. Skill 2: Protecting Winds [ edit ] Protecting Winds Skill 2 Ability Type Immunity Enhance Speed Up Damage Physical Gains Movement Speed and enhances the next Basic Attack. During this effect, becomes Invulnerable to physical damage. Upon learning, gains a permanent Attack Speed boost and enhanced Passive effect. Skill 3: Vaulting Shot [ edit ] Vaulting Shot Skill 3 Ability Type Crowd Control Enhance Damage Physical Jumps at the target, slowing and stunning them, then returns to the original location, gaining an Attack boost and shooting bolts. The higher her Attack Speed, the more bolts are shot. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All * This skin is only available in Global server and will not release in China server See Also [ edit ] Stuart (AoV counterpart)
hero_062: Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Kui Voidcaller General Information Lane: Roamer Role: Support Mage Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 140 Wins : 110 Loses (56%) I exist to guard Chang'an City. Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Ethereal Outburst 2.2 Skill 1: Mortals! 2.3 Skill 2: Join Me 2.4 Skill 3: Into the Void 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] Kui dwells in the mysterious "door" of Chang'an, keeping a close watch on the path to Vacuity and the source of all wisdom that it leads to. Older than Chang'an itself, he'd step out onto Phoenix Street from the doorway in the dead of night and stroll about the quiet areas of a city that only rests once the sun sets. By night, anyone intending to harm Chang'an will be devoured by him and sucked into Vacuity. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Ethereal Outburst [ edit ] Ethereal Outburst Passive Skill Damage Magic Deals area damage upon taking heavy damage in a single hit or after dying. Skill 1: Mortals! [ edit ] Mortals! Skill 1 Ability Type Slow Damage Magic Damages and slows nearby enemies. Marks enemies in the inner circle while inflicting more damage and slow . Skill 2: Join Me [ edit ] Join Me Skill 2 Ability Type Crowd Control Damage Magic Throws a chain hook in the target direction that pulls the target back , dealing damage and marking them. Passive: Defeats and assists permanently boost Health. Skill 3: Into the Void [ edit ] Into the Void Skill 3 Ability Type Shield Crowd Control Damage Magic Deals damage multiple times and slows enemies within range. Against marked heroes, the slow effect is upgraded to a stun . Splash Arts [ edit ] See Also [ edit ] Grakk (AoV counterpart)
hero_063: Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Yuhuan Tunecaster General Information Lane: Mid Lane Roamer Role: Mage Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 2079 Wins : 1749 Loses (54.31%) She wore clothes like clouds, and her face was as fresh as blooming flowers... Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Poignant Melodies 2.2 Skill 1: Tragic Beauty 2.3 Skill 2: Mournful Tempo 2.4 Skill 3: Unending Sorrow 2.5 Skill 4: Melody of Peace 3 Splash Arts 4 Additional Content 4.1 Listen - Stellar Songtress Yang Yuhuan (CG Video) 4.2 Listen (Full Music) - Yuhuan Album Cover Version 5 See Also Introduction [ edit ] As the most renowned musician in Changle District, can touch the hearts of the entire Chang'an city with a single strum of her. Though many of her patrons admire her talents and beauty, barely anyone knows anything about her. Even though her melodies can capture the hearts of all who listen, Yuhuan herself can't help but feel empty on the inside as she struggles to understand this "happiness" that is oft mentioned by others. As she astounds her audience with her talents, she continues to search for her own happiness. As to what form that happiness will take, perhaps she'll arrive at her own answer one day." Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Poignant Melodies [ edit ] Poignant Melodies Passive Skill Ability Type Switch Heal Damage Magic Changes the melody to produce different skill effects. War: Skills deal damage to nearby enemies. Peace: Skills heals (herself and) nearby allies. Skill 1: Tragic Beauty [ edit ] Tragic Beauty Skill 1 Ability Type Slow Damage Magic Damages and slows nearby targets. Her next Basic Attack will deal more damage . Skill 2: Mournful Tempo [ edit ] Mournful Tempo Skill 2 Ability Type Crowd Control Speed Up Damage Magic Gains Movement Speed , and after a brief delay, inflicts damage and stun on enemies in the target area. Skill 3: Unending Sorrow [ edit ] Unending Sorrow Skill 3 Ability Type Immunity Heal Damage Magic Becomes untargetable (also removing all crowd control effects), and after a brief delay, she heals teammates within range and deals damage to enemies. Peace Melody: Using this skill heals herself and nearby allies more Health . Skill 4: Melody of Peace [ edit ] Melody of Peace Skill 4 Ability Type Switch Recovery Peace Melody to War Melody: Changes the melody to War, in which skills deals extra Magical Damage to enemies. War Melody to Peace Melody: Changes the melody to Peace, in which skills restores Health to nearby allies and herself. hero_064: Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Chano Packleader General Information Lane: Farm Lane Role: Marksman Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 1273 Wins : 1238 Loses (50.7%) The Ancient Wolf once said that the spirit of the wolf can be found within its sharpest fang. Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Hunting 2.2 Skill 1: Soaring Signal 2.3 Skill 2: Lupine Trap 2.4 Skill 3: Leader Stance 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] Years later, the Last Wolf had long become the King of the Northlands. Memories of his early days in Chonokh rose to the surface as Chano ignored his foreign allies' invitation to conquer the East and fixed his gaze on the glory and danger hidden in the north of the Winter Ocean. He had been celebrated as a tribal hero and branded a beast, only to be betrayed by his best friend and left at death's doors. Yet he never ceased his pursuit. Unlike most, he understood the secrets of the Sunfall. He knew he was not born to follow mere human desires. His mission was to destroy the source of all suffering in the Northlands... Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Hunting [ edit ] Hunting Passive Skill Ability Type Enhance Speed Up Damage Physical Whenever he moves through brush, gains Movement Speed and enhance his next Basic Attack to a double shot that deals extra damage . Leaps when emerging from brush. Skill 1: Soaring Signal [ edit ] Soaring Signal Skill 1 Ability Type Speed Up Damage Physical Leaps into the air, gaining Movement Speed and allowing him to traverse terrain . While airborne, his Basic Attack fires a powerful arrow, dealing physical damage and knocking back enemies. Skill 2: Lupine Trap [ edit ] Lupine Trap Skill 2 Ability Type Trap Summon Damage Physical Throws a wolf spirit trap at a target location. When triggered, it deals physical damage and summons a wolf spirit to attack the enemy. Skill 3: Leader Stance [ edit ] Leader Stance Skill 3 Ability Type Mount Summon Summons wolf spirits and gains the ability to shoot while moving. Also boosts Physical Attack, Movement Speed, and Attack Speed for 8s. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All See Also [ edit ] Lindis (AoV counterpart)
hero_065: Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Yang Jian Trilight General Information Lane: Clash Lane Jungler Role: Fighter Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 776 Wins : 683 Loses (53.19%) I was called upon to protect this mortal world! Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Mind Games 2.2 Skill 1: Unleash the Hound 2.3 Skill 2: Vain Disillusionment 2.4 Skill 3: Sight of Origin 3 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] Yang Jian has a third eye hidden within his forehead, which is why Nuwa chose him as her successor and bestowed upon him the role of protector of the mortal world. However, after hunting wrongdoers and patrolling the realm for a long time, he began to have doubts about Nuwa's motives. After he had fought in one war after the next and seen a succession of rulers wrestle control from each other, the trials of his friend Nezha finally made him realize that perhaps the world wasn't quite as fragile as Nuwa would have it. The creatures that inhabited it had their own will and lives, and in time, he decided to fight for their right to rule over themselves. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Mind Games [ edit ] Mind Games Passive Skill Ability Type Resist Yang Jian's Basic Attack and skills can stack Resistance. After attaining max stacks, he gains crowd control immunity. If Yang Jian enters battle with a hero, he will enter the Heaven-Earth Form. Skill 1: Unleash the Hound [ edit ] Unleash the Hound Skill 1 Ability Type Mark Movement Damage Physical Commands Heaven Hound to pounce in the target direction, damaging the first enemy hit and marking them. Upon using the skill again, he charges to the target and deals damage . Skill 2: Vain Disillusionment [ edit ] Vain Disillusionment Skill 2 Ability Type Crowd Control Damage Physical True Deals damage to enemies in front, stunning and slowing them. If he hits an enemy, he gains an enhanced Basic Attack that deals extra damage . Skill 3: Sight of Origin [ edit ] Sight of Origin Skill 3 Ability Type Recovery Damage Physical Unleashes beams of light that deal damage and recover his Health. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All
hero_066: Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Nuwa Celestial General Information Lane: Mid Lane Role: Mage Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 1053 Wins : 1040 Loses (50.31%) I decide your future! Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Divine Consciousness 2.2 Skill 1: Divine Glow - Creation 2.3 Skill 2: Divine Glow - Coalescence 2.4 Skill 3: Divine Glow - Emergence 2.5 Skill 4: Divine Glow - Annihilation 3 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] The Primaeran civilization was created by Nuwa, a superbeing who possesses the power to cultivate new worlds. Any threat to mankind and civilization will not escape her wrath, and at one point she even waged a war against the superbeing Diqun to prevent the planet's destruction. Her mandates continue to guide mankind, and everyone pays homage to the civilization she has fostered. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Divine Consciousness [ edit ] Divine Consciousness Passive Skill Ability Type Enhance Gains enhanced vision and range when leveling up. Skill 1: Divine Glow - Creation [ edit ] Divine Glow - Creation Skill 1 Ability Type Crowd Control Terrain Damage Magic Unleashes energy that deals damage , knocks back enemies, and creates a matrix. When the energy stops, it expands to deal extra damage . Skill 2: Divine Glow - Coalescence [ edit ] Divine Glow - Coalescence Skill 2 Ability Type Terrain Crowd Control Damage Magic Creates a matrix that she can jumps over but blocks enemy heroes' movement. Matrices can be fused twice and set off explosions if hit by her other skills. Skill 3: Divine Glow - Emergence [ edit ] Divine Glow - Emergence Skill 3 Ability Type Teleportation Slow Shield Damage Magic Teleports to the target area after a short delay. Generates a shield , gains Movement Speed , deals damage , and slows the enemy. Passive: Magical Attack can reduce cast time. Skill 4: Divine Glow - Annihilation [ edit ] Divine Glow - Annihilation Skill 4 Damage Magic Deals damage to targets in a straight line across the map. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All
hero_067: Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Nezha Wild Spark General Information Lane: Clash Lane Jungler Role: Fighter Release Date: 2017-01-12 (China Server) Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 431 Wins : 490 Loses (46.8%) My very existence defies reason! Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Scorching Ember 2.2 Skill 1: Fire-tipped Spear - Sweep 2.3 Skill 2: Red Armillary Sash - Bind 2.4 Skill 3: Universe Ring - Skyfall 2.5 Skill 4: Universe Ring 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] The powerful Nezha can be defeated, but never tamed. Due to an illness he had as a child, his master Taiyi Zhenren replaced his heart with a Wonder Key. However, his overwhelming power alienated him from his peers, and there was never a moment when he felt free from the rage burning within him. When the superbeings destroyed his homeland in the name of uprooting the Taorians, Nezha's fury ignited the battlefield. But the exertion was too much, and by the end, Nezha lay dying among the ashes. In order to save him, Zhenren gave him his own heart, making him a full person again. Now, the boy reborn in flames will never yield to anyone. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Scorching Ember [ edit ] Scorching Ember Passive Skill Ability Type Shield Speed Up Gains Movement Speed and a shield that negates true damage when attacking the enemy hero (small shield when attacking non-hero unit or Basic Attack or with this passive's shield). The true damage shield can be recovered at the spawn point. Skill 1: Fire-tipped Spear - Sweep [ edit ] Fire-tipped Spear - Sweep Skill 1 Damage Physical True Attacks nearby enemies, dealing damage . This attack also weakens the recovery capability of heroes and deals true damage over time (increases with each stack). Skill 2: Red Armillary Sash - Bind [ edit ] Red Armillary Sash - Bind Skill 2 Ability Type Movement Damage Physical Flips behind the target to deal damage . This skill also gains shield (halved for non-hero units), but cannot used again on the same target for 4s. Skill 3: Universe Ring - Skyfall [ edit ] Universe Ring - Skyfall Skill 3 Ability Type Chase Damage Reduction Crowd Control Damage Physical Flies to a target, dealing damage and knocking them back . When he reaches the target area, gains damage reduction and Resistance . This skill enters cooldown percentage based on flight distance. If the target is untargetable upon arrival, he waits (until 0.5s) until the state ends and knocks back immediately. Skill 4: Universe Ring [ edit ] Universe Ring Skill 4 Ability Type Vision Enhance Damage Physical Unleashes the universe ring, dealing damage to enemy heroes across the entire map and gaining vision . Enhances the range of Universe Ring - Skyfall to cover the entire map for 5s. Heroes revealed by this effect cannot use recall. Note: This skill added since November 27th 2025 update for China Server and March 11th 2026 update for Global Server. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All See Also [ edit ] Max (AoV counterpart)
hero_068: Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Gan & Mo Smith and Blade General Information Lane: Mid Lane Role: Mage Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 1053 Wins : 1204 Loses (46.65%) Two souls, one body. One love, neverending. Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Forever Entwined 2.2 Skill 1: Guard Her Grave 2.3 Skill 2: Coupled Blades - Short 2.4 Skill 3: Coupled Blades - Long 2.5 Skill 4: Freshly Forged 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] Gan Jiang is a master swordsmith from the Misty Marshes with an unnatural obsession with swords and blades. His bed-ridden wife Mo Ye threw herself into the forge in a fit of insanity, sacrificing her life to grant him a divine blade. Gan Jiang was filled with regret, but it was too late, and he allowed the sorcery to corrupt him and make him one with the sword. With the two becoming one, the divine blade transformed into his wife's likeness, and now, Gan Jiang and Mo Ye will never be separated again. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Forever Entwined [ edit ] Forever Entwined Passive Skill Damage Magic Basic Attacks deal extra damage . Flying sword skills have a shared usage cap . When flying swords hit, place Sword Energy on targets, and flying swords deal extra damage to targets marked with Sword Energy. Skill 1: Guard Her Grave [ edit ] Guard Her Grave Skill 1 Ability Type Movement Crowd Control Damage Magic Unleashes Splitting Sword and moves backwards, knocking back enemies and dealing damage while reducing their Magical Defense. Skill 2: Coupled Blades - Short [ edit ] Coupled Blades - Short Skill 2 Damage Magic Throws flying swords that deal damage to enemies in their path. Skill 3: Coupled Blades - Long [ edit ] Coupled Blades - Long Skill 3 Damage Magic Throws flying swords that deal damage to enemies in their path. Skill 4: Freshly Forged [ edit ] Freshly Forged Skill 4 Ability Type Enhance Cooldown Immediately gains 2 uses of flying sword skill and summons more swords to enhance the next flying sword skill. Passive: Increases field of vision and grants one additional use of Coupled Blades. Each time a flying sword hits an enemy, the cooldown of Freshly Forged is reduced . Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All See Also [ edit ] Yue (AoV counterpart)
hero_069: For the Arena of Valor hero of the same name with different skill set, see Wonder Woman . Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Athena Sacred Warrior General Information Lane: Jungler Role: Fighter Assassin Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 59 Wins : 75 Loses (44.03%) From beyond the world of mortals, I condemn you to death! Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Divine Awakening 2.2 Normal Form 2.2.1 Skill 1: Holy Advance 2.2.2 Skill 2: Unstoppable Spear 2.2.3 Skill 3: Immovable Aegis 2.3 Divine Form 2.3.1 Skill 1: Victory Call 2.3.2 Skill 2: Victory Call 2.3.3 Skill 3: Victory Call 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] There was once a proud warrior hailing from a family of knights who served at the Round Table of King Arthur. This warrior has made it her life's mission to defend the kingdom of Sunset from harm. As she faced her greatest fear, a spirit of the Forbidden Realm, head-on, she realized that the spirit was actually the reincarnation of the goddess Athena, and as she was Athena's descendant, she and the spirit became one. From that moment forward, her lance and her armor were to be forged from victory and glory, and she was Athena reborn. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Divine Awakening [ edit ] Divine Awakening Passive Skill Ability Type True Form Crowd Control Damage Physical Able to move in her true form ( Divine form ) after dying. When resurrected, flies toward the nearest allied tower, dealing damage and launching enemies within takeoff range. Normal Form [ edit ] Skill 1: Holy Advance [ edit ] Holy Advance Skill 1 Ability Type Shield Crowd Control Damage Magic Raises her shield and dashes , knocking back and dealing damage to enemies, while gaining a shield . During the shield's duration, she gains crowd control immunity . Skill 2: Unstoppable Spear [ edit ] Unstoppable Spear Skill 2 Ability Type Movement Enhance Damage Physical Dashes in the target direction and enhances the next Basic Attack, charging at the enemy and dealing damage to them. Hitting the same target 3 times successively deals extra damage equal to lost Health. Skill 3: Immovable Aegis [ edit ] Immovable Aegis Skill 3 Ability Type Shield Immunity Damage Magic Raises a shield that grants crowd control immunity . Damage taken while the shield is up will be returned after a brief delay, dealing damage to enemies within range. Divine Form [ edit ] Skill 1: Victory Call [ edit ] Victory Call Skill 1 Ability Type Speed Up Movement Dashes in the target direction. Skill 2: Victory Call [ edit ] Victory Call Skill 1 Ability Type Shield Flaps her wings, granting a shield to a nearby teammate. Skill 3: Victory Call [ edit ] Victory Call Skill 1 Ability Type Crowd Control Teleport Damage Physical Flies toward the nearest allied tower, dealing damage and launching enemies within takeoff range. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All See Also [ edit ] Wonder Woman (Athena's AoV counterpart)
hero_070: Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Cai Yan Healing Tone General Information Lane: Roamer Role: Support Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 530 Wins : 540 Loses (49.53%) Who's ready to crash your party? This cutie! Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Can't Touch This 2.2 Skill 1: Healing Hymn 2.3 Skill 2: Earworm 2.4 Skill 3: Tune of Tranquility 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] The pure and kind-hearted Cai Yan always brings laughter and joy to the people around her. Although she lost her father at an early age, she grew up very much loved by Dian Wei and her foster father, Cao Cao . However, when the truth behind past events was revealed and her adoptive father showed his true colors, she was forced to flee what she thought was her home. No matter her sufferings and predicaments, she never lost sight of herself, and she continues to face this complicated world with a smile. As she flies across the battlefield, she uses her music to inspire and strengthen everyone. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Can't Touch This [ edit ] Can't Touch This Passive Skill Ability Type Recovery Speed Up Periodic Passive Effect: Recovers Health and gains Movement Speed when taking damage. Skill 1: Healing Hymn [ edit ] Healing Hymn Skill 1 Ability Type Heal Speed Up Gains Movement Speed and continuously heals teammates within a certain range. Skill 2: Earworm [ edit ] Earworm Skill 2 Ability Type Crowd Control Damage Magic Fires a sound wave in the target direction, stunning and damaging enemies hit. Sound waves bounce between nearby enemies. Skill 3: Tune of Tranquility [ edit ] Tune of Tranquility Skill 3 Ability Type Heal Enhance Continuously heals the teammate with the lowest Health within range, while granting them Physical and Magical Defense . Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All See Also [ edit ] Helen (AoV counterpart)
hero_071: Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Donghuang Harbinger General Information Lane: Roamer Clash Lane Role: Support Tank Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 508 Wins : 504 Loses (50.2%) The eclipse is near... and so is my miracle! Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Soul Sacrifice 2.2 Skill 1: Eclipse 2.3 Skill 2: Dark Impact 2.4 Skill 3: Forsaken Contract 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] He did not want to settle for the end that all mediocre beings inevitably march toward, so he completed the trials and became Donghuang the Seer. However, even when the truth about the Wonder was exposed and it was revealed that nothing had changed, he still chose to devour their power and became a demigod. Now he resides in his palace high above Misty Marshes, and is revered by the Omniscient. This, however, is not his final goal. One day, he will take all the powers of the Wonder and reign absolute over this world. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Soul Sacrifice [ edit ] Soul Sacrifice Passive Skill Ability Type Recovery Damage Magic Every time a dark orb passes through an enemy, it deals damage and restores Health to him. Skill 1: Eclipse [ edit ] Eclipse Skill 1 Ability Type Recovery Damage Magic Deals damage to enemies within range and summons a dark orb. There can be 3 dark orbs at a time. Hitting enemies with this skill reduces its cooldown , and with 3 dark orbs, it recovers Health. Skill 2: Dark Impact [ edit ] Dark Impact Skill 2 Ability Type Crowd Control Speed Up Damage Magic Unleashes up to 3 dark orbs at the target location, increasing his Movement Speed and dealing damage to enemies in range. The 1st and 2nd dark orbs slow enemies. The 3rd dark orb stuns enemies. Skill 3: Forsaken Contract [ edit ] Forsaken Contract Skill 3 Ability Type Supress Damage Magic Supresses an enemy hero and summons 3 dark orbs. If he or the target takes damage during suppression, the other will take the same amount of damage . Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All This skin is only available in Global server and will not release in China server. See Also [ edit ] Arum (AoV counterpart)
hero_072: Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Guiguzi Animist General Information Lane: Roamer Role: Support Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 323 Wins : 280 Loses (53.57%) Everything has a soul! Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: The Laws of Nature 2.2 Skill 1: Prophecy - Hidden Hand 2.3 Skill 2: The Animist 2.4 Skill 3: Prophecy - Out of Sight 3 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] Knowledge is endless. The scholar Guiguzi was attracted by the secrets of the forest's origin, and became a member of the Order of the Seers. Over the years, he researched nature and the Wonders, and passed on his discoveries to the next generation of Seers. However, the more he learned, the more anxious he became... Eventually, he decided to leave the Order and start anew in nature. He firmly believes that a new truth is out there somewhere. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: The Laws of Nature [ edit ] The Laws of Nature Passive Skill Ability Type Enhance Slow Damage Magic After leaving the enemy's vision, the next Basic Attack deals extra damage and slows the enemy. Skill 1: Prophecy - Hidden Hand [ edit ] Prophecy - Hidden Hand Skill 1 Ability Type Speed Up Camouflage Damage Magic Gains a Movement Speed boost and camouflages himself, reducing the Physical and Magical Defense of enemies touched while dealing damage to them. Skill 2: The Animist [ edit ] The Animist Skill 2 Ability Type Crowd Control sheild Damage Magic Summons spriteflies, and after a brief delay, pulls in nearby enemies, dealing damage and stunning them. If he hits an enemy hero, he and nearby teammates gain a shield . Skill 3: Prophecy - Out of Sight [ edit ] Prophecy - Out of Sight Skill 3 Ability Type Camouflage Vision Speed Up After 1s, camouflages and grants vision to himself and nearby teammates. Gains Movement Speed of the nearest enemy hero. The disguise breaks upon using Basic Attacks, skills, or actions that affect enemies. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All
